title: Kremlin blames Biden admin for 'atmosphere' in US before Trump shooting
shortDescription: Russian President Vladimir Putin hasn't directly addressed the Trump shooting, but a Kremlin rep blamed the Biden administration for the 'atmosphere'.

title: Biden vows security review ahead of GOP convention
shortDescription: President Biden promises review of security ahead of Republican National Convention after assassination attempt against Donald Trump.

title: When is Biden's Oval Office address about the Trump rally shooting?
shortDescription: President Joe Biden is expected to address the nation from the Oval Office tonight to call for unity after former President Donald Trump was shot.

title: Nikki Haley will speak at Donald Trump's convention after all
shortDescription: Nikki Haley had challenged Donald Trump for the Republican nomination. She had been left off the RNC speaker list, but she now will address it.

title: Trump shooting raises questions about Secret Service protection
shortDescription: A former Secret Service director tells USA TODAY that protection for Trump should have extended to 1,000 yards. Alleged shooter fired from 150 yards.

title: Biden calls for national unity after attempted assassination of Trump
shortDescription: President Biden called for unity and said he will give a primetime Oval Office address Sunday following the attempted Trump assassination.

title: Lara Trump expressed concern for Trump's safety days before shooting
shortDescription: Days before former President Donald Trump was grazed by a bullet at a campaign rally, his daughter-in-law Lara Trump expressed concern for his safety.

title: Social media captures rally chaos as Trump is shot
shortDescription: People are seen ducking and then fleeing the scene after gun shots ring out and Donald Trump is escorted off the stage at his rally.

title: Supporters gather at Trump Tower NYC after assassination attempt
shortDescription: Hours after the former president survived an assassination attempt an emotional crowd of supporters gathered at his fomer primary residence.

title: Trump rally shooting victim was firefighter, father
shortDescription: Corey Comperatore, a firefighter and father of two, was killed in an assassination attempt at former President Donald Trump's Pennsylvania rally.

title: Melania Trump, political leaders respond to shooting of Donald Trump
shortDescription: Political officials have come out to not only voice their support for Trump's recovery but condemning the violent act. Here's what they said.

title: Watch: President Biden speaks to media Sunday after Trump rally
shortDescription: President Joe Biden was scheduled to provide updates on the Trump rally shooting investigation into a briefing Sunday. You can watch live here.

title: America reacts after Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: An investigation continues into the attempted assassination of former President Donald Trump at a rally in Bulter, Pennsylvania, on Saturday.

title: What to know about the weapon used in Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: An AR-15 style rifle was used in the attempt to assassinate former President Trump. Here's what to know about the popular gun.

title: Here's when Trump is expected to speak at RNC
shortDescription: Donald Trump will attend the 2024 Republican National Convention, days after a gunman attempted to assassinate him.

title: Shooting shakes a Biden v. Trump election already shattering norms
shortDescription: With an assassination attempt, the word unprecedented seems inadequate to describe where we find ourselves four months before Election Day.

title: What we know: Ronny Jackson nephew injured at Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: The shooting killed one spectator, and seriously injured two others. The shooter, identified as 20-year-old Thomas Crooks, is dead.

title: What we know about Trump rally shooting victims: 1 dead, 2 injured
shortDescription: One person was killed and two were 'critically injured' in a shooting and assassination attempt at a Trump rally. Here's what we know on the victims.

title: Melania Trump condemns assassination attempt: 'Ascend above hate'
shortDescription: The former first lady said she realized her life was "on the brink of devastating change" after bullet grazed Donald Trump.

title: Security preps underway after Trump rally shooting
shortDescription: Following the shooting at a Trump rally in Pennsylvania, concerns have quickly shifted to security at the upcoming RNC in Wisconsin.

title: First video of Trump after assassination attempt
shortDescription: Donald Trump arrives in New Jersey after being rushed off stage during an assassination attempt during his Pennsylvania rally.

title: Timeline: Shooting at Trump rally
shortDescription: An alleged lone gunman opened fire at a rally for Donald Trump in Pennsylvania. The shooting is being investigated as an assassination attempt.

title: Who is Meredith O'Rourke, behind GoFundMe for Trump rally victims?
shortDescription: Meredith O'Rourke of Tallahassee, Trump's top finance person, is listed as the organizer of the online fundraiser.

title: Biden to address the nation after Trump assassination attempt
shortDescription: President Joe Biden called for unity across the country following an assassination attempt of former President Donald Trump.

title: President Biden responds to incident at Trump rally
shortDescription: Biden delivered brief remarks about the shooting that occurred at a Donald Trump campaign rally Saturday, saying, "We cannot allow for this to be happening."

title: Trump rally shooter Thomas Crooks: Where he lived and worked
shortDescription: The FBI identified the shooter as a 20-year-old from Bethel Park, Pennsylvania. His employer says he passed a background check for his job.
